zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Champernowne於1334年出生在英國戴文諾斯 塔福頓時，她的父親Oliver Champernowne35歲，母親Egelina Vautort30歲。她於大約1370年與Sir William Gilbert Sr在英國英格蘭戴文康普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1380年7月6日享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Champernowne于1334年出生在英国戴文諾斯 塔福頓时，她的父亲Oliver Champernowne35岁，母亲Egelina Vautort30岁。她于大约1370年与Sir William Gilbert Sr在英国英格兰戴文康普頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1380年7月6日享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Champernowne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Cambernon in Manche.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Champernowne was born in 1334, in North Tawton, Devon, England, her father, Oliver Champernowne, was 35 and her mother, Egelina Vautort, was 30. She married Sir William Gilbert Sr about 1370, in Compton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 6 July 1380, at the age of 46, and was buried in Marldon, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Champernowne est née en 1334, à North Tawton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Oliver Champernowne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Egelina Vautort, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Gilbert Sr environ 1370, à Compton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1380, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Marldon, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Champernowne 1334 in North Tawton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Oliver Champernowne 35 und ihre Mutter Egelina Vautort 30. Sie hat um 1370 in Compton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir William Gilbert Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 6. Juli 1380 im Alter von 46 Jahren und wurde in Marldon, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Champernowne è nata il nel 1334 nel North Tawton, Devon, England, sua padre, Oliver Champernowne, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Egelina Vautort, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Gilbert Sr circa 1370, nel Compton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 6 luglio 1380, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Marldon, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Champernowneが1334年にイギリスデボンノース タウトンで生まれた時，父Oliver Champernowneは35歳，母Egelina Vautortは30歳であった。約1370年にイギリスイギリスデボンコンプトンでSir William Gilbert Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1380年7月6日に46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンマルルドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Champernowne(이)가 1334년 영국 데폰 노르스 타w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Oliver Champernowne(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egelina Vautort(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 콤프턴에서 Sir William Gilbert Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 7월 6일 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 말를던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Champernowne nasceu em 1334, em North Tawton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Oliver Champernowne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Egelina Vautort, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Gilbert Sr aproximadamente 1370, em Compton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 6 de julho de 1380, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Marldon, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.North Tawton, Devon, England: North Tawton, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Champernowne родилась в 1334 г. в местности норт тавтон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Oliver Champernowne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Egelina Vautort, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Gilbert Sr около 1370 г. в местности комптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 6 июля 1380 г. в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности марлдон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir William Gilbert Sr aproximadamente 1370, en Compton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
